sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing game; sub-pixel precision not documented in source material

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Handling
special_mechanics.description: Racing game featuring Formula One car physics with customizable vehicle parameters (spoilers, tyres, gearbox) affecting performance

special_mechanics.name: Pit Stop Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Mandatory tyre changes during pit lane stops in middle of race; weather conditions determine optimal tyre choice

tier_notes: Tier 2: Racing game with no specific jump/gravity physics documented. Source material focuses on gameplay features, race structure, and game balance rather than technical movement parameters. Physics values related to vehicle handling are qualitative only.
sources_used: wikipedia - Nigel Mansell's World Championship Racing
